## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Float and GrowthX to explore potential collaboration on scaling content creation and SEO efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/VjMY6yTzA2FGhDNN5dnMz-AkW1u1RrNc?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Float is seeking to scale high-quality, pragmatic content creation, particularly for Canadian-focused SEO](https://fathom.video/share/VjMY6yTzA2FGhDNN5dnMz-AkW1u1RrNc?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [GrowthX offers a hybrid AI/human approach to content creation, with end-to-end support from strategy to publishing](https://fathom.video/share/VjMY6yTzA2FGhDNN5dnMz-AkW1u1RrNc?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
  - [GrowthX's typical engagement involves an 8-week strategy sprint ($20k) followed by a 12-month execution phase ($15k/month)](https://fathom.video/share/VjMY6yTzA2FGhDNN5dnMz-AkW1u1RrNc?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)
  - [Float to evaluate GrowthX's offering against current content production efforts and costs](https://fathom.video/share/VjMY6yTzA2FGhDNN5dnMz-AkW1u1RrNc?tab=summary&timestamp=1799.0)

## Topics

### Float's Current SEO and Content Approach

  - [Built in-house content team (1 person + contractors) focusing on high-quality, lower-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/VjMY6yTzA2FGhDNN5dnMz-AkW1u1RrNc?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [Experimenting with AI tools (e.g., AeroOps) for briefs, outlines, and research](https://fathom.video/share/VjMY6yTzA2FGhDNN5dnMz-AkW1u1RrNc?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [Recently expanded marketing team capabilities across content, social media, product marketing, and paid channels](https://fathom.video/share/VjMY6yTzA2FGhDNN5dnMz-AkW1u1RrNc?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [Targeting Canada-specific content, facing challenges with search localization](https://fathom.video/share/VjMY6yTzA2FGhDNN5dnMz-AkW1u1RrNc?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Measuring success through signups, demos booked, and first customer transaction](https://fathom.video/share/VjMY6yTzA2FGhDNN5dnMz-AkW1u1RrNc?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)

### GrowthX's Offering and Approach

  - [Hybrid model combining AI automation with human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/VjMY6yTzA2FGhDNN5dnMz-AkW1u1RrNc?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
  - [End-to-end support: strategy, content creation, imagery, staging, and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/VjMY6yTzA2FGhDNN5dnMz-AkW1u1RrNc?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
  - [Team structure: Editor-in-Chief, Managing Directors (SEO experts), Managing Editors, and Content Managers](https://fathom.video/share/VjMY6yTzA2FGhDNN5dnMz-AkW1u1RrNc?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
  - [Initial 8-week strategy sprint ($20k) to establish foundation, followed by 12-month execution phase ($15k/month)](https://fathom.video/share/VjMY6yTzA2FGhDNN5dnMz-AkW1u1RrNc?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)
  - [Focus on editorial content first, with potential for programmatic opportunities later](https://fathom.video/share/VjMY6yTzA2FGhDNN5dnMz-AkW1u1RrNc?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
  - [Emphasis on thinking like a publisher for sustainable, high-quality content growth](https://fathom.video/share/VjMY6yTzA2FGhDNN5dnMz-AkW1u1RrNc?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)

### GrowthX's Differentiation

  - [Higher margins than average agencies, enabling recruitment of top talent](https://fathom.video/share/VjMY6yTzA2FGhDNN5dnMz-AkW1u1RrNc?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)
  - [Comprehensive ownership of channel growth, unlike traditional agencies with limited scope](https://fathom.video/share/VjMY6yTzA2FGhDNN5dnMz-AkW1u1RrNc?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [Balance of AI-driven efficiency and human expertise for high-quality output](https://fathom.video/share/VjMY6yTzA2FGhDNN5dnMz-AkW1u1RrNc?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
  - [Long-term partnerships (12+ months) preferred for meaningful organic growth impact](https://fathom.video/share/VjMY6yTzA2FGhDNN5dnMz-AkW1u1RrNc?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)

### Next Steps and Considerations

  - [Float to benchmark GrowthX's offering against current content production efforts and costs](https://fathom.video/share/VjMY6yTzA2FGhDNN5dnMz-AkW1u1RrNc?tab=summary&timestamp=1799.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide specific case studies and examples of programmatic content creation](https://fathom.video/share/VjMY6yTzA2FGhDNN5dnMz-AkW1u1RrNc?tab=summary&timestamp=1926.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting with Float's content team to dive deeper into potential collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/VjMY6yTzA2FGhDNN5dnMz-AkW1u1RrNc?tab=summary&timestamp=2044.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to send follow-up email with case studies and examples to Ruslan](https://fathom.video/share/VjMY6yTzA2FGhDNN5dnMz-AkW1u1RrNc?tab=summary&timestamp=2054.0)
  - [Ruslan to CC Float's content person for scheduling a deeper dive meeting](https://fathom.video/share/VjMY6yTzA2FGhDNN5dnMz-AkW1u1RrNc?tab=summary&timestamp=2044.0)
  - [Float to internally assess current content production costs and complexity for comparison](https://fathom.video/share/VjMY6yTzA2FGhDNN5dnMz-AkW1u1RrNc?tab=summary&timestamp=1966.0)
  - [Both parties to prepare for a more detailed discussion on potential collaboration and fit](https://fathom.video/share/VjMY6yTzA2FGhDNN5dnMz-AkW1u1RrNc?tab=summary&timestamp=2054.0)
